BRIDGE PARTY.
The local fraternity of Phi Pappi
Psi entertained at a bridge party
last night In the east banquet hall
of Davenport's in honor of Mrs. c.
M. F. Miles. wife of ex-President
Miles of the national fraternity.


z


SUFFRAGlSTS RETURN.
Mrs. Philip Stafford and Mrs.
Rose Moore, who have been travel
ing on the coast campaigning for
woman's suffrage, returned to the
city last evening.


& & =
MISSIONARY SOCIETY MEETS
The regular monthly meeting of
the Women's Foreign Missionary
society of the First Methodist
church will be held tomorrow after
noon with Mrs. A. f. Dart at her
